ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "sml" TEXT /* Size label (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "uk" INTEGER /* UK size equivalent */,
  "us" INTEGER /* US size equivalent */,
  "fr" INTEGER /* French size equivalent */,
  "it" INTEGER /* Italian size equivalent */,
  "jp" INTEGER /* Japanese size equivalent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size is intended */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of clothing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the inventory is located */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the inventory is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location within the store */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size in stock */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Quantity threshold to trigger a reorder */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the inventory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the inventory entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the sale was made */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale was made */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity sold */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price at which the item was sold */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the sale was recorded */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login (hashed and salted) */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the store is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the store */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the store */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the store entry was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the store entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Customer's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Customer's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the customer account was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the customer account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
